text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O and I are going to meet<n>at a shrine to
welcome in the new<n>year. This marks her advance
to<n>senior racer.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She still hasn't arrived, but then I<n>hear a familiar
voice coming from the<n>main building.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha! Ask something of<n>the gods?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I am accustomed to beingworshipped, but the other wayaround? Well...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: If you insist, I shall come up with<n>something.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hear me, gods. Why not ask mefor a favor, hm?
choice_data_list: Opera O, move over to the side, please.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The side?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I see. Standing at the center<n>makes it seem as
though the masses<n>have come to pray to me
instead.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We hurriedly move to a spot away<n>from the
center...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I must say, it's a perplexing task to<n>think of a
wish the Overlord might<n>ask.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas, what could one who has<n>everything, as I do,
possibly desire?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I could demand to be initiated as the<n>Centurial
Overlord, but that is, as<n>you'd expect... asking a
lot.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Have you any ideas?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And make sure they are overlordly!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
An overlordly desire. If I had to say<n>anything, it
would be...
choice_data_list: A title change to Demon Lord.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, an imperial feast! I will ask the<n>gods to
prepare an assortment of the<n>most lavish
delicacies!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Whooosh!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa! My body is moving on its<n>own! Are the
gods guiding me?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Come along, Trainer! Quickly!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: She leads me to...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A ramen shop? And a rather run<n>down one at that.
But a restaurant of<n>Chinese origin all the same.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The roots are identical, so I will dine in<n>the spirit of
the Qing dynasty rulers. In<n>what manner should I
ask...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Master, I request "the works," if you<n>please. This
is the most affluent, I<n>assume.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And add gyoza and fried rice as<n>toppings for good
measure!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now that is what I call a NewYear's special—the Overlord ramenforte!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Opera O eats every last bite of the<n>extra large
ramen put in front of her.<n>She's full of energy!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A vocational change! Yes, rather than<n>the path of
the Centurial Overlord, the<n>path of the Demon Lord
is also on the<n>table.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How interesting... A new year is the<n>best time to
try new things, and thus,<n>to the dark side I turn.
Behold, I am<n>the Demon Lord! Heavens, cower
before me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Flash! Rumble, rumble!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! Come, torrential<n>downpour! Drench
all of humanity, all<n>of Umamusume kind!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ohh! This play tickles far more than I<n>expected! I
feel a level of greatness<n>never before
experienced!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Acting like a demon lord seems to<n>have made
Opera O stronger in every<n>way.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Restore the ruling system of old! Veni,<n>vidi, vici...
and the like, yes?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Of course! It is time to reclaim control<n>from the
modern-day statesmen.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
President, there is a matter we must<n>discuss. It
concerns the organizational<n>structure of this
academy.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I believe it's about time we do away<n>with these
democratically elected<n>leaders and restore the
right of rule to<n>kings.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I was unaware that Tracen Academy<n>was ever a
monarchy...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Listen well. Rule under a king has its<n>superior
points. Such as...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O elegantly lays out her<n>argument. This
exchange with<n>Symboli Rudolf appears to have
expanded her knowledge.
